popularStory.headline: Eva’s inheritance
popularStory.description:
(Taken from Wikipedia)
Eva de Braose was one of the four daughters of William de Braose and Eva Marshal. Her sisters were Isabella, Maud, and Eleanor. William was the last of the Braose Marcher lords …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva de Braose於1228年出生在英國英格蘭素可布拉波 卡素時，她的父親William de Braose32歲，母親Lady Eve Abergavenny25歲。她於大約1241年與William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1255年7月20日在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年27歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva de Braose于1228年出生在英国英格兰素可布拉波 卡素时，她的父亲William de Braose32岁，母亲Lady Eve Abergavenny25岁。她于大约1241年与William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1255年7月20日在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年27岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Eckhard, Gerhard, Manfred, Otto.
from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).

variants.name: Ambrose
meanings: English and Scottish: from the personal name Ambrose (French Ambroise, Latin Ambrosius, from Greek ambrosios ‘immortal, divine’), which was popular throughout Christendom in medieval Europe. Its popularity was due in part to the fame of Saint Ambrose (c. 340–397), one of the four Latin Fathers of the Church, the teacher of Saint Augustine. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Czech, Slovenian, and Croatian Ambrož (see Ambroz ), and also their derivatives, e.g. the Slovenian patronymic Ambrožič.
Irish: from Mac Ambróis ‘son of Ambrose’ (see 1 above); a West Munster name, which has also been Anglicized as McCambridge .

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

en.lifeSummary: When Eva de Braose was born in 1228, in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, her father, William de Braose, was 32 and her mother, Lady Eve Abergavenny, was 25. She married William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny about 1241, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 20 July 1255, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 27, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva de Braose est née en 1228, à Bramber Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Braose, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Eve Abergavenny, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny environ 1241, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 juillet 1255, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva de Braose 1228 in Bramber Castle, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Braose 32 und ihre Mutter Lady Eve Abergavenny 25. Sie hat um 1241 in England William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Juli 1255 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny circa 1241, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Eva de Braoseが1228年にイギリスイギリススセックスブランバー カストルで生まれた時，父William de Braoseは32歳，母Lady Eve Abergavennyは25歳であった。約1241年にイギリスでWilliam de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavennyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1255年7月20日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで27歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva de Braose(이)가 1228년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Braose(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eve Abergavenny(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1241년 영국에서 William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1255년 7월 20일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny aproximadamente 1241, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva de Braose родилась в 1228 г. в местности брэмбир кастл, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William de Braose было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Eve Abergavenny, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny около 1241 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 20 июля 1255 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

Se casó con William de Cantilupe 3rd Baron Abergavenny aproximadamente 1241, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de julio de 1255, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
